problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: The key to How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? is Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) — specifically Biomimetic surface structure — which would help 1,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
